use.flag: Pull in sci-ml/openvino-genai (the GGUF/LLMPipeline generative-AI layer, which itself drags in sci-ml/openvino-tokenizers) in addition to the base sci-ml/openvino runtime.

pkgmetadata.longdescription: Meta package that ties together the pyrice-overlay OpenVINO stack so a single world entry protects every member from --depclean. It carries no files of its own; enabling or disabling the genai USE flag selects whether the generative-AI layer is part of the set.
